nasb.text: Their heart cried out to the Lord, “O wall of the daughter of Zion, Let your tears run down like a river day and night; Give yourself no relief, Let your eyes have no rest.

esv.text: Their heart cried to the Lord. O wall of the daughter of Zion, let tears stream down like a torrent day and night! Give yourself no rest, your eyes no respite!

cnv.text: 錫安居民的城牆啊，你要一心向主哀求； 願你的眼淚像江河般湧流，晝夜不息； 願你得不著歇息，願你眼中的瞳人不能休息。

ccb.text: 锡安的城墙啊， 你要从心里向主呼求！ 你的眼泪要像江河一样昼夜涌流， 不歇不眠。
